display_text: Phoenix Aghanim's Scepter: Increases the number of attacks required to destroy Supernova and allows Phoenix to cast it on an allied hero. This upgrade is a potent anti-focus fire mechanic, protecting Phoenix and an ally from being burst down during critical moments, ensuring teamfight survivability.
search_text: Phoenix Aghanim Scepter Supernova anti-focus fire teamfight survivability ally protection

display_text: Phoenix Aghanim's Shard: Allows Sun Ray to be cast during Supernova and slows affected enemies. This upgrade counters mobility and sustain mechanics, applying pressure to high-movement enemies while maintaining Phoenix's healing and damage output during Supernova.
search_text: Phoenix Aghanim Shard Sun Ray Supernova anti-mobility sustain slow teamfight control
